author: U001
content: 早晨，今日我哋開個短會傾下 Redis 嘅 migration plan

author: U002
content: 好啊，我準備咗份 cache eviction 策略嘅 doc，陣間 share 畀大家睇

author: U001
content: staging 個 DB migration 仲未 run 完，Bob 可唔可以跟進下？

author: U003
content: On it — 我用緊 flyway，大概15分鐘就搞掂

author: U002
content: Ah Ming，你決定咗用 Redis 定 Memcached？上星期你話 pub/sub 同 persistence 重要

author: U001
content: 決定用 Redis，主因係 pub/sub + built-in persistence，Memcached 冇呢兩樣

author: U003
content: OK，咁我將 session store 改去 Redis。TTL 設一個鐘得唔得？

author: U001
content: 一個鐘 OK，但 admin session 要長啲，set 8 個鐘

author: U002
content: 搞掂，我update 埋 design doc，陣間 push 個 PR 畀你哋 review

author: U004
content: 嗰邊 /search endpoint 個 latency 200ms 已經 over SLA 150ms，可能要加 cache layer

author: U001
content: Alvin 講得啱，呢個同 Redis migration 有關，我哋一齊搞

author: U002
content: 我補埋 observation 去 glossary：「p95 latency 超過 150ms 就要 trigger alert」

author: U003
content: flyway migration 完成，staging 綠燈，production 等 weekend window

author: U001
content: Good，Friday EOD 前 cut release branch，mobile team 下星期一要 build

author: U004
content: 我 book 咗 monitoring review meeting 星期二早上10點，入 Grafana dashboard 睇個 trend

author: U002
content: 加埋一 action item：Bob 要 doc 返 Redis failover runbook

author: U003
content: 收到，會喺今星期五前搞掂

author: U001
content: thanks 大家，散會。會後個 summary 我會 paste 去 #decisions

author: U004
content: Ah Ming 記得 flag 埋 compliance team，session TTL 改動要 legal sign-off

author: U001
content: 好，我 email 阿Ken，legal 方面佢負責
